text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Good day, Trainer. Did you have a refreshing
break as well?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't feel better! I got my hair and tail
treated. They're so sleek and shiny! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
See for yourself! ♪ Hehe! Aren't they both styled
gorgeously?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I always exude the aura of a first-rate
Umamusume! ♪
